title: Deep Learning vs. Reinforcement Learning
description: A flowchart illustrating the core components and interaction between Deep Learning (DL) and Reinforcement Learning (RL), highlighting how DL acts as a function approximator within an RL framework.
relationships: Agent uses Deep Neural Network to choose an Action
Environment provides new State and Reward
Reward signal is used to update the Neural Network
Experiences (S, A, R, S') are stored in the Replay Buffer for training
